name: fastconnect
title: OCI Hybrid Connectivity — FastConnect
summary: Creates FastConnect virtual circuits — partner model (`provider_service_id`) or dedicated colocation model (`cross_connect_mappings`) — terminating PRIVATE circuits on a DRG or advertising `public_prefixes` on PUBLIC circuits.

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory freeform tags.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' freeform tag.

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code for chargeback/showback. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' freeform tag.

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional freeform tags merged beneath the mandatory tag set. Mandatory tags win on key collision.

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: compartment_id
module.description: OCID of the compartment for the virtual circuits.

module.name: drg_id
module.description: OCID of the DRG terminating private virtual circuits. Supplied by OCID — no framework dependency is implied.

module.name: virtual_circuits
module.type: map(object({ bandwidth_shape_name = string circuit_type = optional(string, "PRIVATE") provider_service_id = optional(string) cross_connect_mappings = optional(map(object({ cross_connect_or_cross_connect_group_id = string vlan = number customer_bgp_peering_ip = optional(string) oracle_bgp_peering_ip = optional(string) })), {}) customer_asn = number public_prefixes = optional(list(string), []) }))
module.description: Virtual circuits keyed by logical name. Use provider_service_id for the partner model (provider completes their side out-of-band) or cross_connect_mappings for the dedicated colocation model. PRIVATE circuits attach to the DRG; PUBLIC circuits advertise public_prefixes.

outputs.name: gateway_id
outputs.description: OCID of the DRG terminating private circuits (as supplied).

outputs.name: connection_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical virtual circuit name to virtual circuit OCID.

outputs.name: circuit_states
outputs.description: Map of logical virtual circuit name to BGP management state and provider state.

outputs.name: oracle_bgp_asn
outputs.description: Map of logical virtual circuit name to the Oracle-side BGP ASN.
